gh_0f43ff436748c446d7dae032.title: 🛠 Senior Back-End Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
gh_0f43ff436748c446d7dae032.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As a Back-End Engineer, your pivotal role will encompass the design of a dynamic and scalable back-end architecture optimized for performance, and positioned to accommodate future product developments.

## **Your Journey as a Back-End Engineer**

- Our back-end primarily leverages **TypeScript (Node.js)**.
    - Proficiency in TypeScript is vital
    - However, applicants with experience in other languages like C, C++, C#, Java, Ruby, or GoLang, who can adapt to TypeScript swiftly, are welcomed.
- Our databases are SQL-based, primarily utilizing Postgres. We use ORMs for effective database interaction and management.
- Our production infrastructure thrives on containers, K8, and AWS ECS.
- Our work environment values teamwork.
    - Join hands with a cross-functional team throughout the development cycle, from designing to deploying APIs, SDKs, and other services or tooling.
    - Engage in code reviews to elevate your work and that of your colleagues.
    - Craft reusable and testable code for services and libraries that can be maintained seamlessly.
    - Collaborate with engineers across various departments to create remarkable features.
    - Work in unison with our product team to identify and tackle user pain points.
    - Champion improvements in engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
    - Develop innovative tools for internal teams.
    - Embrace ownership and responsibility for your work.
- API development is a key facet of your role.
    - Design, build, and maintain APIs, services, and systems.
    - Create new APIs or enhance existing ones for our users.
- Troubleshooting and debugging are indispensable skills.
    - Investigate, debug, and upgrade existing software systems, including the development and integration of new components or automation pipelines as needed.
    - Address production issues across services.
- Engage in the launch of new markets, features, or products regularly.

## **What You Bring**

1. Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
2. Five or more years of coding experience or an internship in a similar role.
3. Proficiency in web frameworks, especially JavaScript and Node.js.
4. Experience with databases like PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
5. Familiarity with quality control testing using tools such as QUnit, Mocha, Jasmine, or RSpec.

In this role, you'll have the opportunity to shape the backbone of our software, empowering us to drive forward with innovative product advancements. Are you ready to take the lead?

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

gh_0ffd96f002e45ae989391198.title: Scala/Java Developer - Nearsure
gh_0ffd96f002e45ae989391198.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a growing start-up with amazing opportunities! 
Nearsure was created to help US-based companies augment their software development teams efficiently. By being remote-first and connecting with developers across Latin America, we can access top tech talent while keeping a lean organizational structure. 

Our reach spans thousands of IT professionals, with skills in multiple industries and technologies. We have a fully distributed team working remotely from Argentina, Bolivia, Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, Mexico, Peru and Uruguay and we want to keep expanding all over Latin America!

**Role Description**

We are looking for a Senior Java/Scala Developer to work from home for a challenging project in the US. You will be joining the team of a company who connects the world’s leading organizations with qualified suppliers, contractors, and vendors

The successful candidate will collaborate in our client SaaS Analytics platform and will be responsible for developing and delivering new components and features for the platform 

This is a remote, full-time position with a 40-hours workload per week for Latin America only.

**Job Responsibilities:**

Work with product management and dev team to design, develop and deliver product features and enhancements
Design/develop customer workflows.  Ensure solution is scalable and can handle large data, complex analytics and multiple users
Automate testing and deployment of software so team can deliver enhancements to customers on a regular cadence

**Education/Experience:**

Bachelor Degree in Computer Science or equivalent
3+ years of experience with modern languages such as Java/C#/JavaScript/Scala
Knowledge of Scala/functional programming a significant plus
Experience in cloud automation
Experience in test driven development
Ability to work effectively in a distributed, collaborative, agile environment and deliver solutions on a regular cadence

**What We Offer**

Work from home, with flexible working schedules
Competitive salary in USD
Paid time off (annual leave, National holidays, sick time and parental leave)
Take part in challenging projects for distributed companies in the US
Integrate a growing team with great opportunities for professional growth and a friendly, multicultural environment with a great company culture.
A tailor-made benefits package focused on health, wellbeing, entertainment, training and personal finances available for you to choose what you really care about

We are a fully distributed, multicultural start-up looking for the best talent in Latin America. Don’t hesitate to apply if you feel you are a good fit for this position!

### Contact: dayana.ramirez@nearsure.net
### LinkedIn profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dayana-ramirez-468373114/

gh_0f9ff03150a09e129cb26187.title: [Remoto] Full-stack developer Ionic e Node.js
gh_0f9ff03150a09e129cb26187.description:
## Nossa empresa

Sou um desenvolvedor, que me uni junto com alguns colegas de trabalho para trabalhar com freelas.

## Descrição da vaga

A demanda está maior que nossa disponibilidade e gostaríamos de alguém pra trabalhar num projeto de um novo cliente; este projeto está bastante avançado, e precisamos finalizar tudo para colocá-lo em produção e prestar o suporte. O projeto é feito em Ionic para uma versão Mobile e outra Web do sistema, e o backend é feito todo em node.js usando a infraestrutura serverless da AWS.

## Local

Remoto

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
- Experiência profissional com Ionic
- Experiência profissional com Node.js

**Diferenciais:**
- conhecimentos em React JS; este é um diferencial, pois parte da aplicação está desenvolvida em React JS, porém está quase finalizada, caso o candidato possua este diferencial, daremos preferência para a contratação dele.

## Benefícios

- Nenhum

**Diferenciais:**
- Nenhum

## Contratação

PJ

## Como se candidatar

Envie um email para gustablealves@gmail.com com o assunto "Vaga - full-stack"

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Daremos um feedback no mesmo dia, no mais tardar, no dia seguinte caso enviem em um horário mais avançado da noite

## Labels
Angular, Ionic, Node.js, AWS, Serverless, React JS

#### Alocação
- Alocado
- Remoto

#### Regime
- Freela

#### Nível
- Pleno
- Sênior
